creator: karpes@rpi.edu
text:
lang/modula-3-lib (needed for cvsup) needs bison to build
	(i.e the build fails due to lack of bison), but the Makefile
	doesn't say that it depends on bison.

Fix: 

make the modula-3-lib port depend on bison
How-To-Repeat: 
	take a clean install of above.
	cd /usr/ports/lang/modula-3-lib
	make
